scenes.image_prompt: A vast ancient forest at golden hour, tall trees with shafts of light breaking through the canopy, misty atmosphere, cinematic wide shot, photorealistic
scenes.narration: Long before cities rose and roads were built, there existed a forest older than memory itself. Its roots ran deeper than the rivers, and its canopy touched the edge of the sky.

scenes.image_prompt: A young girl with a lantern walking alone through a dark magical forest at night, fireflies glowing, fairy tale atmosphere, digital art
scenes.narration: Maya had heard the stories from her grandmother. Every elder in the village spoke of the forest spirit — a guardian that appeared only when the forest was in danger.

scenes.overlay_text: Three days before the machines arrived...
scenes.narration: Three days before the machines arrived, Maya saw it for the first time.

scenes.image_prompt: A glowing white deer with antlers made of branches and leaves standing in a misty forest clearing, magical realism, ethereal lighting
scenes.narration: A deer — no, something more than a deer. It stood at the edge of the clearing, its antlers twisted into the shape of ancient trees. Its eyes held centuries of silence.

scenes.image_prompt: Industrial bulldozers at the edge of a forest, environmental destruction, dramatic stormy sky, contrast between nature and machines, cinematic
scenes.narration: By morning, the sound of engines filled the valley. The company had permits. The government had signed. And the forest — the forest had only Maya.

scenes.overlay_text: Some stories don't have easy endings.
scenes.narration: Some stories don't have easy endings. But every story that is told — is a forest that survives.
